"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\evaluate_module.dir/objects.a
D:\Msys2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\evaluate_module.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\evaluate_module.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Msys2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -shared -o evaluate_module.cp311-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\evaluate_module.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\evaluate_module.dir\linkLibs.rsp
